title: Lesson 46
paragraph: This lesson focuses on practical B1 vocabulary for everyday communication.

words.meaning: a device or service for listening to broadcasts
words.example: I listen to the radio while making breakfast.

words.meaning: a place where people pay to eat meals
a large natural flow of water
words.example: The river runs through the center of town.

words.meaning: a hard piece of natural stone
words.example: A large rock blocked the road.

words.meaning: a group of words that expresses a complete idea
words.example: Write one sentence about your weekend.
The singer has a clear voice.

words.meaning: a formal talk given to people
a case used for carrying clothes when traveling
words.example: My suitcase is too heavy to lift.

words.meaning: a place where people watch plays or movies
words.example: We met outside the theater before the show.

words.meaning: a person who writes books, stories, or articles
words.example: The writer described life in a small village.
